title: RERA Developers & Landowners
intro: Zar Ventures partners with RERA-registered developers and landowners to unlock project potential through structured joint ventures, disciplined capital participation, and professional development management. We bring capital, planning, governance, and execution oversight to transform land and projects into high-performing real estate assets.

sections.title: Capital Participation & Financial Engineering
sections.subtitle: Capital infusion at strategic stages:
items: Land acquisition and approvals
Pre-construction and construction
Sales and monetization phases
additionalItems: Risk-mitigated funding frameworks with milestone-linked disbursements

sections.title: Project Feasibility & Planning
items: Market and demand assessment
Financial feasibility, ROI, and IRR analysis
Preparation of DPR (Detailed Project Reports)
Product mix, pricing, and phase-wise launch planning

sections.title: Development Management & Execution Oversight
items: End-to-end development management under JV structures
Time-bound execution monitoring and milestone tracking
Cost budgeting, procurement oversight, and margin protection
Coordination with architects, consultants, contractors, and vendors

sections.title: Regulatory, RERA & Statutory Compliance
items: End-to-end RERA registration and ongoing compliance management
Coordination for statutory approvals and documentation
Transparency and reporting aligned with regulatory norms

sections.title: Sales, Marketing & Monetization Strategy
items: Go-to-market and launch strategy planning
Sales velocity monitoring and inventory optimization
Revenue tracking and cash flow alignment with JV commitments
Support in channel partner alignment and buyer engagement

sections.title: Governance, MIS & Investor Reporting
items: Robust governance framework for JV projects
Regular MIS and performance reporting
Early identification of risks, dependencies, and corrective actions
Clear visibility for all stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle

cta.title: Ready to Partner With Us?
cta.description: Let's unlock the potential of your land and projects together. Contact us to explore partnership opportunities.
